meaning: n.短袜,鞋内衬底,轻软鞋,一击,零食vt.给...穿袜,重击,猛投,请...吃零食vi.爱吃零食adj.非常成功的adv.正着地,不偏不倚地
examples: He groped around in the dark for his other sock.
You've worn a hole in your sock.
An old hot coffee pot is on the sock.
"Coming over here and playing on the real stuff has been great, " Sock said.
Friends hollering up from the street and you throwing the key down in a balled-up sock.
